title: Maternal Distress during Pregnancy and Offspring Childhood Overweight.
ehr_evidence: Data were obtained via computerized telephone interviews and web-based/posted questionnaires from the Danish National Birth Cohort.
summary: A prospective cohort study investigating whether maternal distress (anxiety, depression, and stress) during pregnancy is associated with childhood overweight in offspring at age 7.
key_findings: Prenatal exposure to maternal distress was not associated with childhood overweight at 7 years of age (adjusted OR 1.06, 95% CI 0.96-1.18).
A small tendency of overweight was seen in boys (OR 1.15, 0.99-1.33) but not in girls (OR 0.98, 0.85-1.13).
population: 37,764 women and child dyads from the Danish National Birth Cohort
